End on End

  • If you are on Mastodon, you can follow my blog using @jason@endonend.org

    → 10:16 PM, Nov 7

  • Watch The Deadly Class trailer: assassin academy for teens - Polygon →

    Can’t wait for this show.

    → 10:02 AM, Nov 6

  • Fun night at Misuta Chows with the Mrs. and some good friends. Arcade and great Japanese food.

    → 10:16 PM, Nov 3

  • Stella and her friends finished up their mural at Buffalo Arts Studio. So cool!

    → 5:56 PM, Nov 3

  • Friday night lights. Sort of…

    → 8:42 PM, Nov 2

  • Over at Relic Scout, I shared my pull list and most anticipated comic books for November.

    → 7:45 PM, Nov 1

  • NFL teams aren’t even trying that hard to justify keeping Kap off a team. Here’s my hometown Bills. I get Anderson as a mentor - he’s in his 14th season. Barkley is horrible. If you are tanking sure, but don’t claim you are trying to win.

    → 10:24 AM, Nov 1

  • Finished: Marvel’s Daredevil 📺

    So good. Loved Fisk (again), Bullseye, and Nadeem. Hopefully they will be back for another season.

    → 9:46 PM, Oct 31

  • This kid. Who wants to be a cactus with a mustache?😂

    → 5:07 PM, Oct 31

  • Laverne got a young new companion today: Cocoa. Super fluffy and soft! @macgenie

    → 7:12 PM, Oct 30

  • My latest comic issue recommendation over at Relic Scout: Speculator’s Corner: Volume 2, Issue 3 (Young Avengers Presents #6) - Relic Scout

    → 3:13 PM, Oct 30

  • A Joyous Cover of Love Will Tear Us Apart Again? - kottke.org → So good!

    → 8:50 PM, Oct 29

  • So glad I looked through the JetPens planner section for the 100th time! I found this, which is exactly the view I like and only one I really use in my planner: Hobonichi Accessory - Weekly Calendar 2019 - JetPens.com

    → 10:30 AM, Oct 29

  • Yuno (Live on KEXP) - YouTube →

    One of my favorite albums of 2018. A perfect blend of indie, hip hop, R&B, and even reggae.

    → 10:56 AM, Oct 27

  • Over on Relic Scout, I shared My Comic Collecting Origin Story – how I got started reading and collecting comics. I know there’s a book out there for everyone, so if you need ideas let me know!

    → 9:54 PM, Oct 26

  • Three perspectives

    → 8:24 PM, Oct 25

  • Comic collectors! While we re-factor the Relic Scout app to include more buying tools, the main focus of the site will be content to help collectors (of all types) build a quality collection on a budget. Please subscribe and pass the word! www.relicscout.com

    → 9:26 AM, Oct 25

  • Finished: Marvel’s Luke Cage📺 – Hoping for a Heroes for Hire team-up!

    → 9:14 PM, Oct 24

  • Cousins weekend!

    → 9:50 PM, Oct 20

  • It’s a Tragically Hip kind of day.

    → 11:23 AM, Oct 16

  • Ok, a second watching of Annihilation left a better taste in my mouth. As a movie, it is visually amazing and certainly creepy. As an adaptation of a book I really enjoyed, it took that second viewing to appreciate what it has to offer.

    → 2:41 PM, Oct 15

  • Watched: The Man in the High Castle 📺

    Finished season three this week. So good. Pretty telling most of the negative reviews on Amazon have a theme of homophobia.

    → 12:13 AM, Oct 14

  • Watched: ‎Annihilation (2018) directed by Alex Garland - Letterboxd 🎥

    Feel like I need to watch this again to give it a chance. Spent most of the movie hung up on the differences from the book.

    → 11:54 PM, Oct 13

  • Some couch time with Laverne.

    → 9:01 PM, Oct 13

  • What I Can Control

    swissmiss – What I Can Control →

    Absolutely love this… I made and printed out a version of this to display in our house. Good reminders for adults and kids alike.

    What I Can Control:

    1. My Actions & Reactions
    2. My Boundaries
    3. My Expectations
    4. How I Invest My Time
    5. How I Treat Myself
    6. How I Treat Others
    → 10:16 AM, Oct 13
